caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt with the text "I GON NEVER DO SHIT" sits before a black microphone in a room filled with merchandise and framed photos. In the background, a white mannequin wears a white shirt with a black graphic, and clothing racks are visible beside it. The walls are decorated with several framed photographs. Small logos appear in the bottom corners of the view, including a circular black logo on the left and a red logo reading "BODELLY" on the right. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking into the microphone. His facial expression shifts slightly as he talks, with his mouth opening and closing while his gaze remains focused forward. The background and equipment remain static as he continues his delivery.
